---
title: "Lstibůrek Lab of Statistical Genetics | Milan Lstibůrek"
description: "Statistical genetics, forest genetics, forest tree breeding and conservation, seed orchards, and climate-adaptation research led by Milan Lstibůrek at CZU Prague."
toc: false
---

<style>
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}

.home-wrap {
  position: relative;
  max-width: 950px;
  margin: 3rem auto 0 auto;
  padding: 2rem;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.home-wrap::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  right: 0;
  width: 48%;
  height: 100%;
  background-image: url("images/profile.png");
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: top right;
  background-size: contain;
  opacity: 0.18;
  z-index: 0;
}

.home-content {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  max-width: 680px;
}

.home-title {
  font-size: 2.4rem;
  line-height: 1.15;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.home-content h2 {
  margin-top: 2rem;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .home-wrap {
    margin-top: 1.5rem;
    padding: 1rem;
  }

  .home-wrap::after {
    opacity: 0.10;
    width: 80%;
  }

  .home-title {
    font-size: 2rem;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="home-wrap">

<div class="home-content">

<h1 class="home-title">Lstibůrek Lab of Statistical Genetics</h1>

## About Us

The **Lstibůrek Lab of Statistical Genetics** is based within the Department of Forest Genetics and Physiology at the Faculty of Forestry and Wood Sciences, Czech University of Life Sciences Prague. Led by **Milan Lstibůrek**, we develop and apply statistical-genetic methods for forest tree breeding, seed orchard optimization, conservation genetics, quantitative genetics, genomic selection, and adaptation to changing environments.

Our work is collaborative, combining statistical genetics, forest genetics, genomics, and breeding-program design to address long-term problems in forest tree improvement and conservation.

[Meet the team](pages/team.qmd)

## News

- **June 2026:** New website launched!

</div>

</div>
